---
title: "Create a Litchi-Flightplan"
id: fw-assessment
order: 90
summary: "Develop an applicable flight plan, taking legal restrictions into account, and upload it to the cloud in Litchi format."
modules:
  - module-fieldwork
Goals:
  - module-goals-fw
materials:
  - material-fw-7
  - material-fw-8
  - material-fw-6
activities:
  - activity-fw-14
  - activity-fw-11
  - activity-fw-111
  - activity-fw-12
labels:
  - self-check
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/UAVFieldwork/fw-assessment.md"
---

## Task

Based on this module, plan a reasonable and suitable flight plan for what you consider an important part of the Gisselberger Spannweite. The flight time should be a maximum of 15 minutes.

Your plan must:

- take legal restrictions into account, including air law and protected goods,
- be converted to Litchi format,
- be uploaded to the Litchi Cloud.

## Connected Module

- [Autonomous Flights Made Easy](../modules/module-fieldwork.qmd)
